layout_and_spacing.general: Generous Spacing Philosophy (p-6, p-8, p-12) for landing page. Dense, strict grid hierarchy for CRM dashboard.
layout_and_spacing.landing_page_grid: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid. Asymmetry, Visual Tension. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, compact. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4.
layout_and_spacing.corners: Sharp to minimal roundness (rounded-none to rounded-sm) to emphasize Brutalist/Swiss precision.

component_rules.buttons: Flat, sharp edges, pure primary color or high-contrast black/white. Explicit hover states.
component_rules.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, NO default shadow. Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg on hover for interactive cards.
component_rules.forms: Use customized Shadcn UI with sharp borders. No rounded-full pill shapes. Solid focus rings.
component_rules.tables: High-contrast tables. Clear labels, dense typography. 1px row borders.
component_rules.headers: Landing: Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-black/5). Admin: Solid white with 1px bottom border.

icons.style: Regular or bold weight, sharp geometric styles preferred.

image_urls.description: Modern minimalist office building for the landing page hero section.
Professional team working, for the About or Social Proof section of the public page.
Abstract geometric mesh for section backgrounds or feature highlights.
Avatar placeholder for the admin user profile or testimonial.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for normal text and 3:1 for large text. Use tinted grey instead of pure #808080.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='submit-lead-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: The project uses Javascript (.js/.jsx) files. Do not generate TypeScript (.ts/.tsx) files.
Use standard HTML + Tailwind for creative marketing layouts (Landing Page). Do not use Shadcn 'Card' for purely structural marketing sections.
Use Shadcn heavily customized (sharp corners, strict borders) for the CRM Admin Dashboard, Tables, Forms, Selects, and Dialogs.
Ensure dark text on light backgrounds for maximum authority and readability.
Implement the Lead status workflow using functional color-coding: Blue (New), Yellow (Contacted), Green (Converted). No decorative use of these colors.
Add hover animations to all interactive elements, e.g., explicit text color changes and subtle layout lifts.
For the navigation header, use 'Crystal Glass' effect if content scrolls beneath it.
Adhere to the 'Anti-Default Rule' for fonts. Import Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all iconography.
